title: A Conversation at the Airport
content: A delayed flight left Julia and Marcus waiting at the airport for several unexpected hours. They started talking after discovering they were both reading novels by the same author. The conversation moved easily from books to travel, family traditions, and future dreams. When the boarding announcement finally interrupted them, neither wanted the discussion to end. They exchanged phone numbers before walking toward the gate. Sometimes the longest journeys begin before the airplane even leaves the ground.
